patch.value: Calendar: improve positional view UX (PM-CLI-Z Sentry)

When pm calendar receives multiple positional view args, the error is correct but terse - surfacing in Sentry as PM-CLI-Z (production, last seen 2026-05-25). Improve UX by showing the received args + suggesting canonical single-view + flag usage.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implementation 2026-05-26 on branch dedup-history-rewrite-and-calendar-positional-recovery: replaced plain Error throw with a standalone class PmCliError (declared inside the package to keep it self-contained when installed outside the pm-cli source tree; the class name lines up with the Sentry beforeSend filter isExpectedCliErrorEvent so future PM-CLI-Z occurrences are filtered out). New error includes received args, optional 'Unknown view alias(es)' note, and two concrete recovery commands (single positional + --view flag). Verified all 4 affected test files pass (47/47): builtin-extension-entrypoints, calendar-command, sentry-helpers, cli-main-errors. Manual temp-dir dogfood confirmed: single positional view works, two positionals shows full recovery hint with exit 2.

patch.value: Calendar package now throws a class-named PmCliError (so the Sentry beforeSend filter recognizes it) with received args + recovery hint; verified via 47-test calendar/sentry suite + manual temp-dir dogfood. Branch dedup-history-rewrite-and-calendar-positional-recovery.
